understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') simultaneously. Each level has a limited step budget; running out of steps fails the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement moves the currently selected piece one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction if not blocked. Some objects like walls or immovable blocks completely prevent movement in that direction, even if adjacent. Pushing occurs when a pushable object (block) is immediately adjacent in the movement direction; the piece and the object shift together if the space beyond is clear. Selection can be changed by clicking on another selectable piece using its pixel coordinates. The `movement.{direction}_blocked` hint indicates adjacency but does not guarantee movability; the actual behavior depends on the type of adjacent object.
